prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn the same person into a realistic outdoor travel snapshot in Kyoto. Replace the indoor arcade/claw-machine background with Kinkaku-ji (the Golden Pavilion) beside a reflective pond, with green trees, blue sky, distant wooded hills, and a wooden fence in the foreground. Keep the face obscured with the same rectangular blur/censor block. Change the outfit to a white short-sleeve ribbed knit top with a lace-up neckline, light blue high-waisted denim bottoms, a thin necklace, and a gray-blue shoulder bag. Repose her so she is standing near the fence and holding up 1 peace sign with her right hand beside her face. Bright natural midday sunlight, casual smartphone tourist photo, realistic proportions, soft depth of field.
